audit_items.proof_trace: The only free() call in utils.c is free(ptr) at L240 inside ss_realloc, and it is unconditionally followed by exit(EXIT_FAILURE) at L242, terminating the process before any further dereference can occur. All other functions in utils.c (ss_itoa, ss_isnumeric, run_as, ss_strndup, ss_malloc, daemonize, set_nofile) contain zero free() calls. No use-after-free or double-free path exists.
